subject: Re: Speaking inquiry — Q1 2027 availability
body:
Thank you for reaching out about the Q1 2027 opportunity. I do have some availability in January and February — I'm already confirmed for Grand Rounds at Jackson Health on January 21 and the FNA keynote in Orlando on February 6 2027, so I'd need to work around those.

Could you share more details about the event — expected audience size, format (keynote vs. panel), and proposed topic? My standard speaking fee for half-day engagements starts at $3,500 plus travel; full-day or keynote rates are available upon request.

Looking forward to hearing more.

Karen Bell, PMHNP-BC
Bell Behavioral Health | Fort Lauderdale, FL
karen.bell@voissync.ai | (954) 555-0100

subject: Q3 reconciliation answers — meals receipts and stipend allocation
body:
Anthony,

Following up on your Q3 reconciliation items:

1. The two September meals charges were the lunch with Dr. Thornton (Broward Coalition planning) and the working dinner during the EHR vendor visit. I'll upload both receipts to the shared QuickBooks folder by Friday.
2. Please book Dr. Foster's CE reimbursement as a payroll benefit through Gusto.
3. The NSU adjunct stipend Q3 installment should be allocated as personal income, not practice income.

Let me know if you need anything else to close the quarter.

Karen

subject: Spring 2027 course proposal — Cultural Formulation Interview workshop
body:
Nadine,

I'd like to propose a one-credit elective workshop for Spring 2027 built around the DSM-5-TR Cultural Formulation Interview. It would pair well with PMHNP 612 and give students supervised practice applying the CFI in mock intakes.

I can draft a syllabus and learning objectives over the winter break if there's interest. Would this be something to bring to the curriculum committee in January?

Karen

subject: Coverage plan — Nov 6-7 and holiday week
body:
Rachel, Marcus,

Proposing the following coverage so we're aligned before I post the holiday schedule:

- Nov 6-7 (Rachel at conference): Marcus covers urgent med refills; I'll take any same-day adds.
- Nov 27-28: office closed.
- Dec 24-26: office closed; on-call line forwards to my cell for emergencies only.

Does this work for both of you? Danielle will update the patient portal once confirmed.

Karen

subject: Volunteer availability — winter family education series
body:
Hello,

I'd be glad to lead a session in the winter Family-to-Family education series. My schedule is most open on Tuesday evenings in January and early February.

I can present on recognizing early warning signs and navigating the first psychiatric appointment — a topic families consistently ask about. Let me know which dates you're filling and I'll confirm.

Warmly,
Karen Bell, PMHNP-BC

subject: Asheville long weekend — December dates?
body:
John,

What do you think about a long weekend in Asheville between Christmas and New Year's? We could do the Biltmore lights, and I'd love to get back to that bookshop in Hendersonville.

Claire would need to be back before debate practice resumes Jan 5. Let me check whether Oliver wants to come or stay at the apartment. I'll look at the cabin we liked near Black Mountain.

Love,
Karen

subject: CFI Pocket Guide — second printing notes
body:
Notes for the second printing of the CFI Pocket Guide:

- Update the medication reference table on p. 22 to reflect the 2026 formulary changes.
- Add the new appendix on telehealth cultural considerations.
- Correct the typo in the acknowledgments (Dr. Thornton's title).
- Increase the print run to 750 given the board-prep season demand.

Will finalize files before sending to the printer.

Karen

subject: Follow-up — A1C recheck and Metformin
body:
Dr. Pearson,

Thank you for seeing me last month. I've been consistent with the Metformin 500mg and walking four times a week. I'd like to schedule the A1C recheck you mentioned — would early December work, or should I wait the full three months?

Also happy to bring my recent fasting glucose log.

Thank you,
Karen Bell

subject: Private dining inquiry — staff appreciation dinner
body:
Hello,

I'd like to ask about your private dining options for a small staff appreciation dinner in mid-December — party of about eight. Do you have a prix fixe menu, and can you accommodate one shellfish allergy and one vegetarian?

Please send availability for the second and third weeks of December.

Thank you,
Karen Bell
Bell Behavioral Health

subject: Mom's cardiology follow-up — coordinating
body:
Philip,

Mom has her follow-up with Dr. Thompson at Memorial in Hollywood coming up. Margaret can get her there Tuesday or Thursday, but I'd feel better if one of us called in for the visit summary.

Can you take the phone call this time? I'll send you the appointment details once they confirm. Also — she's been asking when you're driving down next.

Karen

subject: Credentialing recertification — Bell Behavioral Health
body:
To whom it may concern,

We are following up on the recredentialing packet submitted for Bell Behavioral Health (NPI on file). Please confirm receipt and let us know if any documentation is outstanding before the panel renewal date.

Danielle Bennett, our office manager, is copied here and can provide any additional materials.

Thank you,
Karen Bell, PMHNP-BC

subject: Dance recital tickets
body:
Claire,

Reminder to send me the ticket link for the winter modern dance recital so I can reserve seats for Dad, Grandma Rosemary, and me. Let me know if Oliver is coming so I grab a fourth.

So proud of you. Love, Mom

subject: Coalition meeting agenda — November
body:
Lydia,

For the November Broward County Mental Health Coalition meeting, I'd like to add an agenda item on expanding culturally responsive crisis services in the underserved corridors north of Sunrise Blvd.

I can pull some referral data to frame the discussion. Shall I send a one-page brief ahead of time?

Karen

subject: APNA conference — poster submission question
body:
Hello,

I'm preparing a poster submission for the upcoming APNA conference on integrating the Cultural Formulation Interview into PMHNP training. Could you confirm the abstract word limit and the submission deadline?

Thank you,
Karen Bell, PMHNP-BC
Bell Behavioral Health / NSU PMHNP Program

subject: Intake template go-live — Nov 1 question
body:
Hello,

We're scheduled to roll out the new intake template on November 1. Before go-live, can you confirm whether existing in-progress intakes will migrate to the new template automatically, or whether they need to be completed under the current version?

We'd like to avoid disrupting patients mid-intake. Danielle, our office manager, is copied for follow-up.

Thank you,
Karen Bell

subject: Cake order — Claire's birthday Nov 15
body:
Hello,

I'd like to order a birthday cake for pickup Saturday November 14. Salted caramel, the same as last year, serving about ten, with "Happy Birthday Claire" written on top.

Please confirm the pickup time and total. Thank you!

Karen Bell

subject: Suite 210 — HVAC and waiting room request
body:
Hello,

Two items for the suite: the waiting room thermostat in Suite 210 has been running warm in the afternoons — could maintenance take a look? Also, we'd like to request a second set of keys for our new part-time provider.

Thank you,
Karen Bell
Bell Behavioral Health

subject: Thanksgiving plans + drive down
body:
Oliver,

Let me know your last class before the Thanksgiving break so we can plan the drive down from Boca. Grandma Rosemary is coming over Thursday and asked specifically about you.

If you want to bring laundry, you know the drill. Love, Mom

subject: CME workbook — accreditation hours question
body:
Hello,

I'm finalizing the Cultural Competence CME Workbook through Bell Clinical Press and would like to confirm the process for designating contact hours. Could you point me to the current application and the fee schedule for self-study CE accreditation?

Thank you,
Karen Bell, PMHNP-BC

subject: Website update — add new provider bio
body:
Reminder to update the practice website: add Marcus Hawthorne's provider bio and headshot to the Our Team page, update the insurance panel list to include the recently confirmed plans, and refresh the office hours for the holiday closures.

Karen
